productDisplayName: John Players Men Striped Orange Shirt
description: Style noteThis john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined spread collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it in the conference room or during after-hours dinner. An office-ready wardrobe essential, wear this with dark chinos and a pair of Oxfords. For a classier look, throw on a blazer over this shirt. Product DetailsWhite shirt with orange stripes, has a spread collar, buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, short sleeves and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean or machine wash with like colours onlyUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
